column1: 子どもの頃、よくこの川で魚を捕まえたものだ。
column2: こどものころ、よくこのかわでさかなをつかまえたものだ。
column3: As a child, I used to catch fish in this river.
column4: たものだ (used to / would ~ back then — nostalgic recollection)
column6: recalling habitual past actions or states with nostalgia or reflection; 'I used to ...'
column8: たものだ = habitual past (nostalgic); ていた = was doing/used to do (neutral past); よく~した = used to do (more casual); ものだ alone = 'that's just how things are'
